title: SetResponse<T=serde_json::Value> default type parameter avoids boilerplate for callers
description: SetResponse uses a default type parameter T=serde_json::Value. This lets read_position_set and message_create return SetResponse (unqualified) while still allowing a future caller to use SetResponse<TypedObject> when the created/updated map shape is known. A contributor might remove the default to 'keep generics simple'. That would force every caller to either spell out SetResponse<serde_json::Value> or require an explicit type annotation at call sites, breaking the ergonomics of the common case.
